creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

So, you only have this error when you have a floppy disk in 
the system?  Or do you have this problem all the time? 

Your PR is not very clear and does not give proper information 
to make sure we can look into this.  Can you tell us more about 
the used system, when the problems occur (and when the problem 
does not occur) etc.
